files.path: pdf/The Scientist and Engineer Guide to DSP.pdf
files.name: The Scientist and Engineer Guide to DSP.pdf

limits.bookmarks: Outline/bookmarks read via pdf.js getOutline() (titles only; dest resolution partial).
limits.annotations: Per-page annotation counts only; form field values and popup text are not expanded into chunks.
limits.multi_column: Reading order is line-based (y then x). Multi-column layouts may interleave incorrectly; see multiColumnHints per page when detected.
limits.vector_vs_raster: Embedded raster regions: bbox from canvas paint tracking + PNG crops. Pure vector graphics without image paint ops only appear in full-page raster, not as separate crops.
limits.tables: Heuristic: ≥3 gap-aligned cells × ≥3 consecutive rows. Headers/units are not guaranteed; inspect markdown.
limits.code: Monospace font-name heuristic on text layer; not OCR.
limits.struct_tree: Per-page PDF structure tree is probed; heading hierarchy in chunks uses outline titles + font-size heuristics when outline is missing.
